title: Amanda freaking Winn Lee
wikitext:
[]: Amanda freaking Winn-Lee Post by Maximilian » Wed Nov 14, 2007 6:56 pm Hey, new here. I'm pretty sure this belongs in the discussion section... Anyway, I recently saw EoE on DVD for the first time. At first, I was surprised by the improvement of the English voice cast over their series performance. I'm aware that Amanda directed EoE, and at first I was really happy with what she's done. And then the JSSDF came in. God, why did she feel the need to change their lines so greatly? And WHY did she add in sound effects, such as the *squishy brain* sound that was put in during the scene where Misato shoots that one JSSDF guy in the head? For God's sake, it's a translation , not an adaptation, so why add things? WHY? /rant Anyone else notice/become enraged by this?

[]: Re: Amanda freaking Winn-Lee Post by TriLink » Wed Nov 14, 2007 6:59 pm Maximilian wrote: Anyone else notice/become enraged by this?

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Nov 14, 2007 7:00 pm well new guy, let's just say you will likely be very popular here and you might have wanted to searched for this topic before posting it

[]: Post by Maximilian » Wed Nov 14, 2007 7:02 pm Ooh, is there one already? :oops: Sorry. I was going to search, but I wasn't really sure what to look for. I'll do that now. Edit: Yeah, it was mentioned in an old one, [url]http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3522&highlight=amanda+winnlee[/url] My mistake!

[]: Post by Ornette » Wed Nov 14, 2007 7:07 pm you will find the answers to your questions here: Death, Artistic Integrity, and Amanda Winn Lee (locked) What was that noise? (End of Evangelion dub question) Do we HAVE to hate AWL? Death and Rebirth/End Of Evangelion Commentary Track

Article: Amanda freaking Winn Lee
[]: Amanda freaking Winn-Lee Post by Maximilian » Wed Nov 14, 2007 6:56 pm Hey, new here. I'm pretty sure this belongs in the discussion section... Anyway, I recently saw EoE on DVD for the first time. At first, I was surprised by the improvement of the English voice cast over their series performance. I'm aware that Amanda directed EoE, and at first I was really happy with what she's done. And then the JSSDF came in. God, why did she feel the need to change their lines so greatly? And WHY did she add in sound effects, such as the *squishy brain* sound that was put in during the scene where Misato shoots that one JSSDF guy in the head? For God's sake, it's a translation , not an adaptation, so why add things? WHY? /rant Anyone else notice/become enraged by this?

[]: Re: Amanda freaking Winn-Lee Post by TriLink » Wed Nov 14, 2007 6:59 pm Maximilian wrote: Anyone else notice/become enraged by this?

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Nov 14, 2007 7:00 pm well new guy, let's just say you will likely be very popular here and you might have wanted to searched for this topic before posting it

[]: Post by Maximilian » Wed Nov 14, 2007 7:02 pm Ooh, is there one already? :oops: Sorry. I was going to search, but I wasn't really sure what to look for. I'll do that now. Edit: Yeah, it was mentioned in an old one, [url]http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3522&highlight=amanda+winnlee[/url] My mistake!
